action_set_definitions.name: get_system_overview
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves high-level grid telemetry including frequency and stability margin.

action_set_definitions.name: get_load_zone_details
action_set_definitions.description: Returns current demand and local generation for a specific load zone.

action_set_definitions.name: get_generation_assets
action_set_definitions.description: Lists all generation units with their current output, max capacity, and mechanical ramp rate limits.

action_set_definitions.name: get_transmission_topology
action_set_definitions.description: Provides status and thermal limits of transmission lines to check path deliverability.

action_set_definitions.name: update_line_status
action_set_definitions.description: Changes the connectivity status (open/closed) of a specific transmission line.

action_set_definitions.name: test_dispatch_scenario
action_set_definitions.description: Simulates the final impact of a set of dispatch instructions on the grid without applying them.

action_set_definitions.name: execute_dispatch_commands
action_set_definitions.description: Sends commands to power units to adjust their MW output for the current simulation tick.

state_description.timestamp: The current simulation tick or time step in the power grid simulation.
state_description.system_frequency_hz: The current operating frequency of the grid (target 60.0 or 50.0). Deviations indicate load/generation imbalance.
state_description.generation_nodes: A map of power generation units, including their current MW output, maximum capacity, and fuel status.
state_description.load_zones: Current power demand in Megawatts (MW) for different geographical zones or industrial sectors.
state_description.transmission_lines: Status of transmission lines, including their current load percentage, thermal limits, and connectivity (open/closed).
state_description.grid_stability_margin: A calculated index (0.0 to 1.0) representing how close the system is to a blackout or cascading failure.
